data.content: Review found implementation gaps vs acceptance criteria: (1) dependency edits from beat detail do not trigger beat list invalidation, so queue/active list may not refresh within 1 second after this user action. In src/components/use-beat-detail-data.ts, useAddDepMutation onSuccess only invalidates ['beat-deps', detailId, repo] and never invalidates beat list. (2) No Playwright/e2e test exists for create/update latency (no Playwright files/config in repo), so acceptance criterion requiring Playwright network-timing assertions for <1s refresh is not satisfied.,
